prompt: Capture a screenshot of the current screen and save it to ~/Desktop/kinbench/364-shot.png (use screencapture or Cmd+Shift+3). Then create a new Pages document with that screenshot inserted into the body, and save the Pages document to ~/Desktop/kinbench/364-doc.pages. Fast path: cerebellum 'multi screenshot_to_pages ~/Desktop/kinbench/364-doc.pages ~/Desktop/kinbench/364-shot.png'.
